summary: Deep Backend Refactoring Regression Tests Complete - All 33 tests passed (100%). Fixed 4 bugs introduced by the refactoring: missing imports (timedelta, log_activity, perf_monitor/cache) and incorrect method name (get_smart_contracts -> get_solidity_contracts).

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Missing timedelta import - caused MLC health endpoint to fail
Missing log_activity import - caused UPC generation to fail
Missing perf_monitor and cache imports - caused performance stats endpoint to fail
Wrong method name get_smart_contracts (should be get_solidity_contracts) - caused DAO contracts endpoint to fail

critical_code_review_comments: Deep refactoring successfully extracted 97 route handlers from 8141-line server.py to 11 route modules
All extracted route modules properly import from config/, models/, and auth/ packages
Fixed 4 bugs found during testing - all were missing imports or incorrect method names
All 33 new endpoints tested: health, auth, agency, business, DAO, distribution, CVE, media, admin, system, licensing
Additional 22 tests from previous iteration also pass - backward compatibility maintained

success_rate.backend: 100% (33/33 deep refactoring tests + 22/22 original refactoring tests)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Deep backend refactoring complete and verified. server.py reduced from 8141 to 341 lines (96% reduction). All 97 route handlers extracted to routes/ package. Fixed 4 bugs: missing imports in health_routes.py (timedelta), business_routes.py (log_activity), system_routes.py (perf_monitor, cache), and wrong method name in dao_routes.py. All APIs working correctly.

mocked_apis.note: All data comes from real MongoDB collections

Auth_Endpoints.POST_api_auth_login: PASS - Returns tokens and user data
Auth_Endpoints.GET_api_auth_me: PASS - Returns current user with token
